transcript: AI: Hello, what is your name? Man: My name is Rahul. AI: How old are you? Man: I have 22. AI: 'I have 22' nahi, 'I am 22 years old' hota hai. [Not 'I have 22', it is 'I am 22 years old'.] Man: Okay, I am 22 years old. AI: Where are you from? Man: I am Uttar Pradesh. AI: 'I am Uttar Pradesh' nahi, 'I am from Uttar Pradesh' hoga. [Not 'I am Uttar Pradesh', it should be 'I am from Uttar Pradesh'.] Man: Mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [I don't know English well.] AI: Koi problem nahi. AI teachers try kiya? [No problem. Tried AI teachers?] Man: Wo to mehnge hote honge? [Aren't they expensive?] AI: Bilkul nahi. Normal classes se 7x sasta hai. 50 lakh log MySivi use kar rahe hain. [Not at all. 7x cheaper than normal classes. 50 lakh people use MySivi.] Man: Par time nahi milta. [But I don't have time.] AI: Roz ki 15-20 mins practice kaafi hai. [Just 15-20 mins daily practice is enough.] Man: Kaise join karun? [How to join?] AI: Install button dabao aur MySivi app download karo. [Press install and download MySivi.] Voiceover: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click install now and download MySivi.]
on_screen_text: ME NO ENGLISH; 7X CHEAPER; MySivi AI English Speaking App; Install Now
summary: A man struggles with basic English grammar while speaking to an AI avatar. The AI corrects his mistakes and introduces MySivi, a highly affordable and convenient AI-powered English learning app. Viewers are urged to click 'Install Now' to download the app and start improving in 15 days.
